intermediateSteps.content: 我来帮您打开并显示pom.xml文件的内容。

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
  <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

  <parent>
    <groupId>work.ganglia</groupId>
    <artifactId>ganglia-parent</artifactId>
    <version>0.1.7-SNAPSHOT</version>
  </parent>

  <artifactId>ganglia-example</artifactId>

  <dependencies>
    <dependency>
      <groupId>work.ganglia</groupId>
      <artifactId>ganglia-harness</artifactId>
    </dependency>
    <dependency>
      <groupId>work.ganglia</groupId>
      <artifactId>ganglia-local-file-memory</artifactId>
    </dependency>
    <dependency>
      <groupId>work.ganglia</groupId>
      <artifactId>ganglia-coding</artifactId>
    </dependency>
    <dependency>
      <groupId>work.ganglia</groupId>
      <artifactId>ganglia-web</artifactId>
      <version>${project.version}</version>
    </dependency>
    <dependency>
      <groupId>work.ganglia</groupId>
      <artifactId>ganglia-terminal</artifactId>
    </dependency>
    <dependency>
      <groupId>io.vertx</groupId>
      <artifactId>vertx-core</artifactId>
    </dependency>
    <dependency>
      <groupId>org.slf4j</groupId>
      <artifactId>slf4j-api</artifactId>
    </dependency>
    <dependency>
      <groupId>org.apache.logging.log4j</groupId>
      <artifactId>log4j-slf4j2-impl</artifactId>
    </dependency>
  </dependencies>

  <build>
    <plugins>
      <plugin>
        <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
        <artifactId>maven-checkstyle-plugin</artifactId>
        <configuration>
          <skip>true</skip>
        </configuration>
      </plugin>
      <plugin>
        <groupId>com.diffplug.spotless</groupId>
        <artifactId>spotless-maven-plugin</artifactId>
        <configuration>
          <skip>true</skip>
        </configuration>
      </plugin>
    </plugins>
  </build>
</project>

--- [Lines 1 to 67 shown] ---

Output was very long and has been compressed. ID: 36d76d28.
Summary: **Summary**

The user asked for a recursive count of all `.md` files in `/Users/stream/codes/llm/ganglia/ganglia-example`.  
The assistant repeatedly tried to run the command via sub-agents, but every attempt hit:

```
RECURSION_LIMIT: Sub-agent depth limit reached.
```

After multiple failures, the assistant gave up on automatic execution and instead provided the exact shell command the user should run:

```bash
find /Users/stream/codes/llm/ganglia/ganglia-example -name "*.md" -type f | wc -l
```

No actual count was returned; the user still needs to execute the command locally.
